This is the form Castform takes when covered in snow. Its body becomes an ice-like material, with a temperature near 23 degrees Fahrenheit.
This is Castform's form when caught in a hailstorm. Its cold skin is as smooth as ice.
This is the form Castform takes when hit by hail. In an experiment where it was placed in a freezer, it didn't change to this form.
This is Castform's form when caught in a hailstorm. Its whole body is chilled, and its skin is partially frozen!
